title: Section 15
content: Notwithstanding anything contained in the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 (2 of 1974), an offence punishable under this Act shall be cognizable and non-bailable. STATE AMENDMENT Karnataka Insertion of new section 15A.--In the principal Act, after section 15, the following shall be inserted, namely:-- “15A. Police Officer to take cognizance of an offence suo-motto.--Every Police Officer shall take cognizance of an offence committed in his jurisdiction under this Act, suo motto.” [Vide Karnataka Act 26 of 2017, s. 7].
